rounds: The 6am necklace with zero deliberation? Joy police didn't even get a word in — you won that one clean. Painted toes on a Saturday, chemist aisle nail shade comparison without flinching — those are yours too. But they're still loud somewhere, loud enough that Dante had to write it down and remind you they're not right.
pattern: They're loudest when you already know the answer.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
